error.signature: CMake Error: Error evaluating generator expression

verdict.summary: CMake generator expression syntax error. Common with nested expressions or incorrect parameter counts.

dead_ends.action: Use regular CMake variables inside generator expressions
dead_ends.why_fails: Generator expressions are evaluated at generate time, not configure time; regular variables may not exist yet.
Quoting can break nested expressions in some contexts.

workarounds.action: Check generator expression syntax: ensure balanced angle brackets and correct parameters
workarounds.how: Validate with cmake --trace-expand to see expanded expressions

workarounds.action: Use cmake_language(DEFER) for complex conditional logic
workarounds.how: Simpler than deeply nested generator expressions
